full_text:
Gengshi Emperor [Liu Xuan] (Shenggong) 更始帝劉玄 (聖公)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Gengshi Emperor [Liu Xuan] (更始帝劉玄), styledShenggong (聖公). Han Emperor restored to power after Wang Mang’s reign. Viewed as weak and incompetent. Gengshi Emperor [Liu Xuan] was an historic figure affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Gengshi Emperor [Liu Xuan] lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
